'''vawïffïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikumene|oikumene]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikumene|oikumene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| vawïffïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || vawïffïfth || vawïffïfj || vawïffïfsh || vawïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || vawïfwïffïfth || vawïfwïffïfj || vawïfwïffïfsh || vawïfwïffïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vawïffïfïf || vawïffïfïf || vawïffïfïf || vawïffïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || vawïffïfth || vawïffïfj || vawïffïfsh || vawïffïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vawïffïfïfl || vawïffïfïfl || vawïffïfïfl || vawïffïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vawïffïfïfïf || vawïffïfïfïf || vawïffïfïfïf || vawïffïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || vawïffïfïfn || vawïffïfïfn || vawïffïfïfn || vawïffïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vawïffïfïforo || vawïffïfïforo || vawïffïfïforo || vawïffïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|17b0cff}}
